name: Bernese Potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-4 quart saucepan over medium heat, melt the butter.
2. Add onion, carrot, celery, and garlic; cook, stirring often, until soft but not browned.
3. Mix in pepper, marjoram, nutmeg, potatoes, and broth. Bring to a boil, then cover and reduce heat slightly.
4. Continue boiling gently until potatoes are tender (25-30 minutes).
5. Puree the soup about half at a time in a blender or food processor until smooth.
6. Return the puréed mixture to the cooking pan.
7. Gradually blend in milk and reheat until steaming hot. Do not boil.
8. Stir in cheese, about 1/4 cup at a time, until it is smoothly melted into the soup.
9. Taste and add salt if needed.
10. Serve immediately.
